purpose: Inspect unmatched column-edge witnesses from the global 900 carrier mapping attempt.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.

Text hits and broader parser hits indicate possible parser/schema gaps, not proof of a global carrier predicate.

claim.short_form: Unmatched global column edges were inspected to separate parser/schema gaps from apparent source absence.
claim.not_closed_reason: This inspection does not evaluate a full global carrier predicate.

interpretation.main_result: The global carrier evidence map is partial; this inspection identifies whether unmatched canonical edges are visible under broader parsing or only by text traces.
interpretation.next_if_parser_gap: Patch the global edge parser and rerun the column-edge to global carrier map.
interpretation.next_if_no_parser_gap: Treat unmatched columns as a real schema/source boundary and record the partial global witness theorem.
